content.en:
With the use of various secret techniques and the increase of the secret treasure, the combat power of the Blood Disk Universe God now is vaguely about breaking the combat power of the invincible Eternal Ancient Highness, which is almost comparable to the combat power of the Supreme Highness.

It's a pity that there is still a big gap between the combat power of His Invincible Eternal Ancient Highness and the combat power of His Supreme Highness.

The Blood Disk Universe God still failed to break this limitation, but even so, his strength skyrocketed.

"Your Highness Wanfa be careful!"

The great gods of the human race reminded them to stay away from here one by one, lest they be affected by the battle.

"You're still too weak!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Then, he cast the Temporal Blade.

"Go!"

The blade of time and space instantly froze this void, and time and space seemed to freeze.

In the next moment, the blade of time and space struck the Blood Disk Cosmic God.

I saw that the body of the Blood Disk Universe God slowly collapsed and turned into countless fragments.

Slash with one hit!

Not far away, the great gods of the human race were stunned.

The combat power displayed by the Blood Disk Universe God just now far surpassed them, and even that Eternal Rank Highness was like an ant, but such a powerful Blood Disk Universe God coupled with various secret techniques was still killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

"It's too powerful!"

The great gods of the human race exclaimed.

"You guys are waiting here, if there is a cosmic god who comes down from the cultivation, I will come here as soon as possible!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he left here.

The reason why he dared to guarantee that he would be able to get here in time was not because of speed, but because of a talent - the talent of splitting!

The splitting talent was copied by Ye Tian from the slug old monster in the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm, and this talent can split into a large number of small clones, and the main body can be teleported over instantly through the clones.

Of course, the more doppelgangers this talent splits into, the weaker the ontological strength becomes.

Therefore, Ye Tian would not use this kind of talent at all.

But this time, Ye Tian separated several clones and left them at the entrance and exit, once he sensed the arrival of the strong man of the ghost clan, he could instantly fuse the body into the clone here through splitting talent to achieve the effect of teleportation.

Therefore, Ye Tian would rush over in time, otherwise he would really not be able to take care of the situation here in other places.

It can be said that the talent for splitting really helped a lot.

......

"The Blood Disk Universe God has fallen!"

The Ten Killings Supreme calculated.

He knew very well the strength of the Blood Disk Universe God, if he lowered his cultivation to the Great God level, he would be able to maintain a combat power comparable to that of His Royal Highness the Invincible Eternal Ancient in a short period of time.

But now, he fell shortly after entering the Netherworld, indicating that he had encountered a great god-level that was enough to kill the combat power of His Invincible Eternal Highness.

"Your Highness the Supreme Rank!"

The Ten Killings Supreme muttered.

He now finally understood why the Terran was able to almost slaughter the Great God Level of the Ghost Race under the condition of being at a disadvantage, because a Supreme God-level Highness was born in the Human Race.

And the ghost clan doesn't have such information!

"Terrans, you are so despicable!"

The Ten Kills Supreme roared.

Having died so many great god-level and cosmic children, how could a powerful cosmic god have died, the loss of the ghost clan is too heavy.

At this time, the great god level of the ghost clan was still dying in the netherworld, and there was a supreme-level highness waiting at the exit position, and these great gods of the ghost clan could not rush out at all.

"Yuan Ming Supreme, don't force me, end the trial immediately!"

The Ten Killing Supreme said angrily.

"Impossible, our two clans have signed an agreement, this time it will be opened for a minimum of one month and a maximum of one year. "

Yuanming Supreme Dao.

"If you don't finish, I'll take them out personally!"

The Ten Kills Supreme has shot.

He displayed the power of the Supreme, tore through the space with both hands, and easily stepped into the world barrier of the Netherworld.

A small world is nothing to him, even if it is an incomparably special small world, it is difficult to stop a supreme.

Bang!!!

The barriers of the world have been torn apart!

As long as the power of the Ten Killing Supremes invades the Netherworld, although it will be suppressed by the origin of the Netherworld, as long as the origin of the Netherworld is suppressed for a short time, and then all the remaining children of the universe and the great gods of the ghost clan can be brought out!

This is not a difficult task for him, it can be done in an instant.

But only if no one stops him!

But Yuanming Supreme also made a move, stopping his next move.

I saw that the Yuan Ming Supreme stabbed with a sword and bombarded the body of the Ten Killing Supreme, directly shocking the Ten Killing Supreme back.

"Ten Killing Supreme, do you want to break the agreement? Once the racial agreement is broken, you need to bear the consequences! Just now, you forcibly interfered in the trial, which is already considered to be a violation of the agreement between the two races, and I even suspect that you want to kill the children of the universe of our human race!"

Yuan Ming Supreme said coldly.

"You dare to stop me, you're just an ordinary supreme, be careful that I kill you!"

The Ten Kills Supreme threatened.

"You do have the strength to kill me, but do you dare?"

Yuan Ming Supreme said unremittingly.

Immediately, he said: "This time, the great gods of your ghost clan are all destined to die, and you should obediently accept such a fact!"

The Yuan Ming Supreme was deliberately provoking the Ten Killings Supreme and making the Ten Killings Supreme in a state of madness.

There is no right or wrong in racial battles, just victory and defeat, which is the truth of the universe.

"You're looking for death!"

The Ten Kills Supreme punched him, and it was his supreme fist mastery - the Ten Killing Fist!

With this punch, the heavens and the earth shattered, and the laws of ten light years shattered.

Even the Netherworld was crumbling, and a large number of rifts appeared.

With the strength of the Supreme, if you attack the Netherworld with all your strength, it is enough to wipe the Netherworld from the universe.

With the strength of the Yuan Ming Supreme, if you take this move hard, you will definitely be seriously injured.

But he didn't panic at all.

Suddenly.

A spear poked out of nothingness and received a punch from the Ten Killing Supreme.

This shot not only shocked the Ten Kills Supreme, but even pierced the Ten Kills Supreme's fist.

"Mixed Yuan Supreme!

When the Ten Kills Supreme saw the comer, he was completely stunned.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme looked at the Ten Killing Supreme, and said coldly: "Ten Killing Supreme, you have broken the agreement between the two races, and vainly tried to kill the Yuan Ming Supreme of our race, which is tantamount to declaring war on our human race, according to the agreement of all races in the universe, I have every reason to kill you." "

At this moment, the Ten Killing Supremes fully understood the intentions of the human race!
